CustomField.description: Please note: The data stored in this field is linked to the HomeKeeper National Data Hub. Seller’s Closing Costs + Total Payoff Amount of All Loans + Other Reductions to Amount Due Seller + Paid at Resale By Program + Seller Adjustments for Seller's Unpaids. Should equal Line 520 on the HUD-1.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Seller’s Closing Costs + Total Payoff Amount of All Loans + Other Reductions to Amount Due Seller + Paid at Resale By Program + Seller Adjustments for Seller's Unpaids. Should equal Line 520 on the HUD-1.
CustomField.label: Total Reductions to Amount Due Seller
